item.title: System Failures in 4 Year Old Noah's Death
item.description: Reports on 4-year-old Noah’s death point to serious failures by adults and the system meant to protect him. This video examines the verified facts, accountability questions, and the need to remember

media:content.media:title: System Failures in 4 Year Old Noah's Death
media:content.media:description: Reports on 4-year-old Noah’s death point to serious failures by adults and the system meant to protect him. This video examines the verified facts, accountability questions, and the need to remember

item.title: Teen pregnancy claim ends in tragedy
item.description: A young girl’s pregnancy claim is linked to a tragic outcome, raising painful questions about what happened and whether warning signs were missed. This video looks at the verified facts, the impact

media:content.media:title: Teen pregnancy claim ends in tragedy
media:content.media:description: A young girl’s pregnancy claim is linked to a tragic outcome, raising painful questions about what happened and whether warning signs were missed. This video looks at the verified facts, the impact

item.title: What They Found in His Freezer Was Nauseating!
item.description: When you hear of the horrific things that happen on the dark web you think they are just mythical stories or exaggerated but many are just the tip of the iceberg. This episode is one that will make you shudder. I genuinely cannot comprehend the fear that Cassidy Rainwater went through when James Phelps and Timothy Norton kidnapped her. This case is straight out of a horror movie. Em x

media:content.media:title: What They Found in His Freezer Was Nauseating!
media:content.media:description: When you hear of the horrific things that happen on the dark web you think they are just mythical stories or exaggerated but many are just the tip of the iceberg. This episode is one that will make you shudder. I genuinely cannot comprehend the fear that Cassidy Rainwater went through when James Phelps and Timothy Norton kidnapped her. This case is straight out of a horror movie. Em x

item.title: They Bullied Their Own Son
item.description: Children are especially vulnerable to narcissistic behavior and domestic abuse. How do you feel about this case?

media:content.media:title: They Bullied Their Own Son
media:content.media:description: Children are especially vulnerable to narcissistic behavior and domestic abuse. How do you feel about this case?

item.title: She Was OBSESSED with Other People's Pregnancies! | Taylor Parker
item.description:
Taylor Parker spent years becoming deeply fixated on pregnancy, carefully building a false image of an expectant mother while hiding a disturbing reality from those around her. As the deception grew more elaborate, it ultimately led to one of the most shocking criminal cases in recent U.S. history, leaving an innocent family devastated.
This video examines the timeline of the case, the investigation, and the evidence presented in court, while exploring the warning signs, the psychology behind prolonged deception, and the lasting impact on everyone involved.
Do you think there are warning signs that people often overlook when someone's deception becomes increasingly extreme?

media:content.media:title: She Was OBSESSED with Other People's Pregnancies! | Taylor Parker
media:content.media:description:
Taylor Parker spent years becoming deeply fixated on pregnancy, carefully building a false image of an expectant mother while hiding a disturbing reality from those around her. As the deception grew more elaborate, it ultimately led to one of the most shocking criminal cases in recent U.S. history, leaving an innocent family devastated.
This video examines the timeline of the case, the investigation, and the evidence presented in court, while exploring the warning signs, the psychology behind prolonged deception, and the lasting impact on everyone involved.
Do you think there are warning signs that people often overlook when someone's deception becomes increasingly extreme?

item.title: They Found the Bodybags in Their Own SHED!
item.description: Robert Leo Marzejka suffocated, and beat to death his sister, Danielle and her boyfriend Seren Bryan in August 2018 in their mobile home. It is one of the most chilling stories I've ever covered. I cannot imagine how the family must have felt when they came in face to face with that room filled with flies with two big body bags just laying in there... What are your thoughts? Em x

media:content.media:title: They Found the Bodybags in Their Own SHED!
media:content.media:description: Robert Leo Marzejka suffocated, and beat to death his sister, Danielle and her boyfriend Seren Bryan in August 2018 in their mobile home. It is one of the most chilling stories I've ever covered. I cannot imagine how the family must have felt when they came in face to face with that room filled with flies with two big body bags just laying in there... What are your thoughts? Em x
